articles.title: Passengers evacuated from hantavirus-stricken cruise ship begin flying home from Canary Islands
articles.description:
Spanish passengers were the first to leave the MV Hondius following its arrival in Tenerife, the largest island in the Spanish archipelago off the West African coast.

The post Passengers evacuated from hantavirus-stricken cruise ship begin flying home from Canary Islands appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Passengers from the MV Hondius were evacuated due to hantavirus concerns.
Spanish passengers began flying home from Tenerife on May 10, 2026.
Boston residents with travel plans may face disruptions or health advisories.

articles.title: What’s causing an engine shake in my 10-year-old SUV?
articles.description:
John Paul, AAA Northeast's Car Doctor, hears from a reader experiencing engine shaking in a 2016 Audi.

The post What’s causing an engine shake in my 10-year-old SUV? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: John Paul, AAA Northeast's Car Doctor, addresses engine shaking issues in 2016 Audis.
Readers can seek advice from AAA Northeast for vehicle maintenance concerns.
Local residents may face increased repair costs if engine issues are not addressed promptly.

articles.title: 5 takeaways as Red Sox fall flat against Rays on Mother’s Day
articles.description:
Payton Tolle got off to a tough start against a formidable lineup.

The post 5 takeaways as Red Sox fall flat against Rays on Mother’s Day appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox lost to the Rays 8-2 on Mother's Day, disappointing local fans.
Pitcher Payton Tolle struggled, allowing five runs in just three innings.
This loss drops the Red Sox further behind in the AL East standings.
